project_type: Full-stack AI video generation app - FastAPI backend + React/Vite/TypeScript frontend
build_system: pip install -e '.[dev]' for backend, npm for frontend
test_framework: pytest with pytest-asyncio for backend, vitest for frontend
build_command: cd backend && pip install -e '.[dev]' && cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build
test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v && cd ../frontend && npm run build
verification_instructions: 1. Run backend tests: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v. 2. Build frontend: cd frontend && npm run build. 3. Verify no TypeScript errors.
setup_instructions: 1. cd backend && pip install -e '.[dev]'. 2. cd frontend && npm install.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode - full network access available. OpenRouter API key already configured in .env with base URL https://api.openrouter.ai/v1
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits, feature branches. Follow existing code patterns.
key_patterns: MediaProvider abstract base class with .search() method + MediaProviderRegistry for pluggable providers. Settings via pydantic-settings. Frontend uses collapsible settings panels (QualitySettings pattern). API client in frontend/src/api/client.ts. Types in frontend/src/types/index.ts. Hooks pattern for state management (useVideoGeneration).
directory_structure: backend/app/config.py (pydantic settings), backend/app/services/ (ai_gateway, media_sourcer, etc), backend/app/models/schemas.py (Pydantic models), backend/app/routers/videos.py (API routes), frontend/src/components/ (React components), frontend/src/pages/ (page components), frontend/src/hooks/ (custom hooks), frontend/src/api/client.ts (API client), frontend/src/types/index.ts (TypeScript types)
